name: Valentine Lollipops
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly coat the lollipop molds with safflower oil.
2. In a small bowl set over a saucepan of simmering water, melt the white chocolate until smooth. Remove from heat.
3. In another small bowl set over the same saucepan of simmering water, melt the bittersweet chocolate until smooth. Allow to cool slightly.
4. Pour a small spoonful of white chocolate into the bottom of each mold.
5. Pour a small spoonful of bittersweet chocolate over the white chocolate.
6. Using a toothpick, swirl the chocolates together to create a marble effect.
7. Repeat layering and swirling until the molds are filled.
8. Insert lollipop sticks into the groove in the molds and rotate them to coat with chocolate.
9. Gently tap the molds on the work surface to release air bubbles.
10. Refrigerate the lollipops for at least 3 hours or overnight until very firm.
11. Refrigerate cookie sheets until chilled.
12. Invert the molds onto the chilled cookie sheets.
13. Gently bend the corners of each mold to release the lollipops. It may be necessary to let the molds stand for 30 seconds and then repeat bending.
14. If desired, insert each lollipop into a red cellophane bag and tie decoratively with gold ribbon.
15. The lollipses can be prepared up to 3 days in advance. Cover tightly and keep refrigerated.
